NOM:interaction.name: InnerStartSimulation
NOM:interaction.semantics: Receive Internal start simulation command(CommunicationManager to ScenarioManager)

NOM:interaction.name: InnerStop
NOM:interaction.semantics: Receive Internal stop simulation command(CommunicationManager to ScenarioManager)

NOM:interaction.name: InnerStartMLS
NOM:interaction.semantics: Send Internal start simulation command(ScenarioManager to LauncherControlManager)

NOM:interaction.name: InnerStopMLS
NOM:interaction.semantics: Send Internal stop simulation command(ScenarioManager to LauncherControlManager)
